description:
Talos Linux RK3588 NPU — dependency update config.

TALOS_VERSION is the single tracked input for the NPU build. PKGS_COMMIT is
NOT tracked directly — it is derived from TALOS_VERSION and verified in CI
(scripts/derive-versions.sh). KERNEL_VERSION is a label, asserted at build time.

Talos-stack PRs do NOT automerge: bumping Talos couples the kernel + signed
module, and CI does not compile the module, so a human must review and (after
validating on a canary node) merge. auto-tag.yaml then tags → release.yaml builds.

packageRules.description: Talos stack updates (TALOS_VERSION + RKNN runtime in common.sh) — manual review only. Bumping Talos couples the kernel/signed module and CI does not compile it, so never automerge.
GitHub Actions — automerge all updates (pinned SHA digests preferred)
Docker base images in Dockerfiles — require manual review
Go dependencies — automerge patch updates only

regexManagers.description: Talos version in common.sh (the single tracked NPU-build input). PKGS_COMMIT/KERNEL_VERSION are derived from this and verified in CI.
